projectDescription: FRC Team Robototes' Java robot code for the 2026 game REBUILT, featuring a swerve drivetrain, turret-based launcher, vision-assisted pose estimation, and autonomous path planning.
keyFeatures: CTRE Phoenix 6 swerve drivetrain with field-centric control
Corner turret with auto-aim using Newton-Raphson ballistic solver
Three-Limelight vision system with MegaTag2 pose estimation and defense detection
PathPlanner autonomous routing with named command integration
Dual robot support (Alpha and Competition bots) via serial-number detection
Moving-shot prediction with phase delay and acceleration compensation
Full robot simulation including vision, fuel, and ground truth physics
Networktables-based live tuning for launcher constants and vision parameters
LED feedback system with mode-aware patterns via CANdle
DataLog telemetry with 14 Hz flush and build-info stamping
publicApiSurface: CommandSwerveDrivetrain (applyRequest, resetPose, addVisionMeasurement, resetTranslation, getState, samplePoseAt, registerTelemetry)
TurretSubsystem (setTurretPosition, zeroTurret, rotateToTargetWithCalc, pointFacingJoystick, getTurretPosition, atTarget, brakeTurret, coastTurret)
IntakeSubsystem (smartIntake, deployPivot, retractPivot, extakeIntake, intakeWhileLaunch, IntakeMode enum)
AutoLogic (init, initCommandsAndPaths, initSmartDashBoard, getSelectedAuto, getSelectedAutoStartingPose, filterAutos)
